_readme: Generated by tools/build_copub.py from authors.json + OpenAlex. Do not edit by hand. Pairwise co-publication counts between the co-author network's nodes across ALL their works (not just papers with the site owner), excluding works with more than 30 authors (consortium-scale hub papers). Pairs below w=2 are omitted. 'a'/'b' are node ids (slugified names) matching coauthors-data.json; 'w' is the number of shared works. build_coauthors.py reads this file to weight edges.
